machine work
under human authority.

A complete public evidence institution for AGIJobManager: guided start, proof demos, evidence rooms, settlement lifecycle, readable architecture, assurance, legal/data-zero boundary, AGIALPHA market boundary, and separated expert-only surfaces.

Everything remains available. No page, demo, proof route, evidence room, legal boundary, command center, atlas, or expert surface has been removed. Choose the right path from the Experience Concierge, Experience Atlas, or Command Center.
Default deny. Public pages are default read-only and never connect wallets, approve tokens, broadcast transactions, authorize funds, certify external factual correctness, or grant production authority.

A model can answer. An agent can act. An institution must prove. The website now routes every visitor through that principle without burying them in stacked menus.

Best demonstrations.

Search all pages
Core

Superintelligence Proof Governance Console

Run the clearest corridor from loop state to RSI gates to ASI-horizon authority: evidence, replay, baselines, red-team shocks, council review, human boundary, and GovernanceDocket export.

Core

ASI Proof Horizon Console

The flagship horizon demo: loop state, RSI gates, ASI boundary, proof, replay, validator quorum, HorizonProofDocket, and human authority.

Core

Loop → RSI Control Room

Run the clearest console for contract-first loops, ECI, baselines, Move-37 gates, replay, dossier, Chronicle, and human review.

Core

From Loop to RSI

Convert a long-running loop into deterministic invention governance: ECI, baselines, Move-37 stress gates, dossier, and Chronicle.

Core

Loop Operating Room

Prompt once. Loop until proof: contract, roles, trace, restart, Evidence Docket, Chronicle.

Core

Trust Equation

Proof, validation, settlement, and reuse convert output into trusted work.

Evidence

Evidence Docket

A claim-bound proof room with replay, risk, provenance, and decision state.

Routing

Router Observatory

Route the smallest sufficient validator-bound constellation.

Settlement

Settlement Lifecycle

No ProofBundle, no settlement. No replay, no settlement.

Boundary

Public-safe by design.

No account, no forms, no analytics, no cookies, no public wallet connection, no token sale, no custody, no investment advice, no legal/tax/financial advice, and no production authority from public pages.

Superintelligence Proof Governance Console.

ASI Proof Horizon Console.

New v52 demonstration

Loop → RSI → ASI Governance Console.

The latest public-safe control room shows the full horizon: a restartable loop becomes RSI governance, then enters an ASI-grade authority firewall where proof, replay, baselines, risk, validator quorum, rollback, and human review decide what can advance.

Open the v52 console →Open Loop → RSIBuild Evidence Docket
New control room

Run the Loop → RSI Control Room.

The newest public-safe demonstration makes the transition visible: a restartable loop writes state; RSI admits only what survives evidence, baselines, replay, persistence, dossier packaging, and human review.

v64 command console

One box for the whole institution.

A visitor no longer has to understand the site map before starting. They describe the outcome; GoalOS composes the mission, selects the route, and emits a local command receipt.

Open GoalOS Take-Care Console →Open Mission AutopilotOpen all pages
v65 take-care console

One box. GoalOS prepares the proof path.

The simplest interface is now front and center: type what you want, get a local mission contract, proof plan, verifier mesh, route handoff, and TakeCareReceipt.
